name: why-we-get-sick
description: Benjamin Bikman's 'Why We Get Sick' — the science of insulin resistance as the root cause of most chronic diseases, including heart disease, Alzheimer's, cancer, NAFLD, and PCOS, with practical strategies for reversal.
useCase: Understand how insulin resistance drives chronic disease and learn evidence-based strategies to reverse it through diet, exercise, and lifestyle changes.
knownRisks: Some claims about LDL cholesterol and statins contradict mainstream medical guidelines
Dietary recommendations (low-carb, keto, intermittent fasting) may not be suitable for everyone
Always consult a doctor before making significant dietary changes, especially if on medication
